common_fixes.fix: Set wheelchair_accessible on every trip (most small-agency fleets are 100% accessible, so this is often a single default).

members.name: Unitrans (ASUCD / City of Davis)
members.top_fix: Set wheelchair_boarding to 1 (accessible) or 2 (not accessible) for every stop. A field survey can start with the busiest stops.

members.name: Yolobus (Yolo County Transportation District)
members.top_fix: Set wheelchair_accessible on every trip (most small-agency fleets are 100% accessible, so this is often a single default).
